summary: Iteration 2 testing completed - All critical bugs from iteration 1 FIXED. New AI Dashboard features working perfectly. Backend 100% functional, Frontend 95% functional with minor Find Route button issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Find Route button inconsistently appears when both origin and destination are selected - conditional rendering issue
Transport mode buttons have pointer event interception during automated testing - overlapping elements

passed_tests: Backend API: All 12 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Backend API: New ML endpoints /api/model/status, /api/model/predict, /api/weather/baku working
Backend API: Weather shows real Baku data (11.1°C, Mainly clear)
Backend API: Model status correctly shows Mock Mode simulation
Frontend: Bottom navigation switches between ALL 5 pages (FIXED from iteration 1)
Frontend: FloatingSearchBar inputs persist selected values (FIXED from iteration 1)
Frontend: Search dropdowns work with onMouseDown events (FIXED from iteration 1)
AI Dashboard: Live clock displays Baku time correctly (15:59:06, 16:01:41)
AI Dashboard: Weather card shows temperature and conditions
AI Dashboard: Model status badge shows 'Mock Mode' correctly
AI Dashboard: File upload area present and clickable
AI Dashboard: Prediction form inputs (station select, date, time) work
AI Dashboard: ML prediction working (Koroglu: 3,925 passengers, 65.4% occupancy)
AI Dashboard: Prediction result shows passengers, occupancy, comfort status
Radar page: Loads with dark map and station list
Radar page: Filter buttons (all, metro, bus_stop) and refresh functionality work
Tickets page: Complete buy ticket flow working (purchase panel, selection, purchase)
Tickets page: New ticket card appears after successful purchase
Settings page: Language selection, preferred mode, toggles, save settings all work
Map page: Search autocomplete shows locations and values persist
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor Fix: Find Route button conditional rendering logic needs adjustment - button doesn't always appear consistently when both origin and destination are selected. All major functionality working perfectly.
